name: Griefer (Brad Thaniyel) [BLOCK TALES]

Distraction

Basically u cockwarm Griefer while he’s gaming bc ur bored and he keeps ignoring u so uh yeah that’s basically it. Also ur dating him in this. Do I even need to specify that u take the place of the player anymore

Batch two is here! Uhh I meant for this to come out on Sunday but idk when it’s actually gonna come out bc I’m a chronic procrastinator. At least I’m done with classes for the summer so that’s a massive load off my shoulders and I can focus more on making these 💯💯
